mapper.sql: id, scenic_id, scenic_name, people_num, lng, lat, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert:
insert into get_abjzg_minute_people_hot_data (id, scenic_id, scenic_name, people_num, lng, lat, create_time, update_time) values
( #{item.id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.scenicId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.scenicName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.peopleNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.lng,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.lat,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
on duplicate key update people_num = values(people_num), update_time = sysdate()
mapper.select: select lng,lat,people_num as count from get_abjzg_minute_people_hot_data where create_time > #{time} or update_time >#{time}
